$metadata.title: Stencil + Frame design tokens
$metadata.note: Source of truth for the S+F visual system. CSS custom properties in index.html and any compiled CSS are derived from this file — edit here, not there. Font migration: Fraunces + Big Shoulders Display + DM Sans → Mona Sans Variable (2026-07-06). Load via @fontsource-variable/mona-sans or self-hosted variable woff2; register wght and wdth axes as typed @property custom properties for smooth interpolation.

display.$description: Display and headline role. One variable superfamily for both display and body — hierarchy via axis values only. Previously: Fraunces (display) and Big Shoulders Display.

sans.$description: Body copy and UI text role. Same family as display; differentiated by wght/wdth axis preset only. Previously: DM Sans.

mono.$description: Code, technical accents, brand.md editor UI, margin annotations (P2 surface). Unchanged in this migration.

display.$description: Display / headline. Expanded + black. Tight letter-spacing (-0.01em). Slows reading. Human-voice copy is lowercase — no all-caps here; uppercase is reserved for UI chrome (see subhead token).

subhead.$description: Subhead / eyebrow. Normal width, semibold. Uppercase with wide tracking — UI chrome register (labels, nav, badges). Contrast against display token makes hierarchy readable without additional typefaces.

body.$description: Body copy. Normal width and weight. Apply opacity: 0.7 on --warm-white (#f0ede6) for secondary reads — do not use a different color, use opacity.

cta.$description: CTA / link. Medium weight, normal width. Lowercase — voice register, not chrome. Distinction from subhead (uppercase/chrome) encodes the brand's caps rule in the token itself.

gold.$description: Primary accent — labels, CTAs, hairlines, interactive affordance only.

coral.$description: Vesica Piscis mark only — never used elsewhere in the system.
